plugins.name: ezoic-marketing
plugins.description: Ezoic's marketing operating system for Claude Code — one consolidated skill (13 task playbooks) covering multi-channel content, sales materials, decks, landing pages, objections, campaigns, positioning, and brand review. Resolves the canonical Ezoic brand system live (ezoic-brand MCP / iheartezoic.com API) with bundled references as fallback, and enforces the brand contract across every output. Proprietary, source-available — © Ezoic Inc.
